sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13622" key="a)porrinh/mata" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπορρῑν-ήματα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n13622.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">filings, scraps,</tr_> Daphitasap.eund.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:14:1:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.1.39</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
